overview:
## Return Value

An array whose contents have been randomly shuffled.

## Discussion

Use this method with an instance of [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRandomSource] (or of one of its subclasses) to randomly rearrange the contents of an array. For example, in a card game you might use this method to randomize an array of card objects.

# arrayByShufflingObjects(in:)

**Instance Method**

Returns an array whose contents are the same as those of the specified array, but in a random order determined by the random source.

## Declaration

```swift
func arrayByShufflingObjects(in array: [Any]) -> [Any]
```

## Parameters

- **array**: An array of objects.

## Return Value

An array whose contents have been randomly shuffled.

## Discussion

Use this method with an instance of [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRandomSource] (or of one of its subclasses) to randomly rearrange the contents of an array. For example, in a card game you might use this method to randomize an array of card objects.
